name: harness
description: Planner / Generator / Evaluator loop for harness-driven application development.

interface.shortDescription: Run a Planner -> Generator -> Evaluator development loop.
interface.longDescription: Agentic Harness turns a short product idea into a file-backed loop: Planner writes docs/spec.md, Generator implements one sprint at a time, and Evaluator verifies the result before the next sprint.
defaultPrompt: Use Agentic Harness to build a small web app.
Start a Planner -> Generator -> Evaluator loop.
